description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped plot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The building is surrounded by lush greenery, including several large trees, flowering shrubs, and a manicured lawn. A driveway with two parked cars leads to a garage on one side, while the opposite side of the property features a circular pool and a wooden gazebo nestled among trees. The bungalow has large windows and glass doors, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The roof includes a glass atrium or skylight, and the garden is bordered by hedges and flower beds. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living with a strong integration of indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a pool, and a wooden gazebo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, garage, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool, wooden gazebo, and extensive garden area with flowering trees.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the pool, curved garden path, and the glass atrium on the roof.
description_view_3: Side view with the garage in the foreground, driveway, and a clear view of the bungalow's flat roof and garden perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
